productDisplayName: Vishudh Women Printed Rust Red Kurta
description: Composition Rust red printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck and four button placket, yoke with gold stitch and tape detailing, short sleeves with gold stitch and tape detailing, and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The gold thread and tape detailing add zing to this kurta. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
